channel.title: sheet on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in sheet on IT notes

item.title: Bosh cheatsheet
item.description: BOSH is a project that unifies release engineering, deployment, and lifecycle management of small and large-scale cloud software. Check your environment: $ bosh env Set your deployment environment: $ export BOSH_DEPLOYMENT=foo if have multiple deployments in same dir better to use -d <deployment-name> since many commands are bound to this variable. To recreate your environment (virtualbox), remove the line that start with current_manifest from the file state.
